inline_comments.message: Just a side note: using one of bash bultins for this (hash, command, type) is much cheaper that invoking external bin.

True, 'type' seems to be a better alternative, although I can see that 'type' in bash and dash and possibly other shells behaves slightly different (different return codes and output) - so I see 'which' as a more reliable command. Also the performance hit here is practically non-existant. But good to know when speed will be an issue.
